help.title: Help & Support
help.subtitle: Learn how RightsPath can help you understand your legal rights and access government schemes easily.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.description: RightsPath is your AI-powered assistant that simplifies complex legal information and government schemes. We provide instant, accurate answers to your questions about legal rights, government benefits, and procedures in simple, easy-to-understand language.

voiceText.title: Voice & Text Support
voiceText.description: Ask questions using your voice or by typing. Our system understands natural language in English, Hindi, and Tamil.

legalRights.title: Legal Rights Simplified
legalRights.description: Get complex legal information explained in simple terms that everyone can understand.

govSchemes.title: Government Schemes
govSchemes.description: Discover government benefits and schemes you're eligible for, with step-by-step application guidance.

instantAnswers.title: Instant Answers
instantAnswers.description: Get immediate responses to your questions, available 24/7 whenever you need help.

step1.title: Create Your Account
step1.description: Sign up with your email or use Google to create your account. This helps us save your question history for future reference.

step2.title: Choose Your Language
step2.description: Select your preferred language from English, Hindi, or Tamil using the language selector in the top-right corner.

step3.title: Ask Your Question
step3.description: Type your question or use the microphone button to ask by voice. Be specific about your situation for better answers.

step4.title: Get Your Answer
step4.description: Receive detailed, easy-to-understand answers with actionable steps. All your questions are saved in your history for future reference.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.answer1: Yes, RightsPath is completely free to use. You can ask unlimited questions about your legal rights and government schemes without any cost.
faq.question2: How accurate is the legal information provided?
faq.answer2: Our AI system is trained on updated legal documents and government resources. However, for complex legal matters, we recommend consulting with a qualified lawyer.
faq.question3: Can I use RightsPath in my local language?
faq.answer3: Yes! RightsPath supports English, Hindi, and Tamil. You can ask questions and receive answers in your preferred language.
faq.answer4: Absolutely. We follow strict privacy guidelines and your personal information is encrypted and secure. We never share your data with third parties.

languages.title: Available in Multiple Languages
languages.description: RightsPath is available in three languages to serve users across India better.

support.title: Need More Help?
support.description: If you can't find what you're looking for or encounter any issues, our support team is here to help you.

email.title: Email Support
email.description: Send us an email and we'll respond within 24 hours.

phone.title: Phone Support
phone.description: Call us during business hours for immediate assistance.

hours.title: Support Hours
hours.description: Monday to Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM (IST) | Saturday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM (IST)

getStarted.title: Ready to Get Started?
getStarted.description: Join thousands of users who are already using RightsPath to understand their rights better.
